Event: Royal Challenge - Season 34
Event Date: 01/02/2025
Sage Bot Item Code: AM141
Nautical Knot Amulet

For the duration of the battle, a frost aura spreads in a small radius around the unit. All enemies in the aura have their attack speed reduced by 35%.
Also, every 4 sec 2 random enemies in the aura are frozen for 2 sec. During this time, the frozen units cannot move or attack, and the cooldown time of their gear and artifact abilities is increased by 2 sec. Also, every 4 sec the 2 random allies in the aura remove all effects of freeze and stiffness.

Requirements: 98-100

User rating: item not rated yet
